# Project Submission

Thank you for contributing a project.

Please complete the template below so maintainers can evaluate your submission efficiently.

---

## Project Title

Provide the name of your project.

Example:

* PDF RAG Assistant
* Autonomous Research Agent
* Multimodal Study Companion

---

## Project Category

Select one:

* [ ] Foundations
* [ ] Machine Learning
* [ ] Deep Learning
* [ ] LLM Engineering
* [ ] RAG
* [ ] Agents
* [ ] LLMOps
* [ ] Multimodal AI
* [ ] AI Safety
* [ ] Other

---

## Project Description

Provide a concise summary.

Example:

A Retrieval-Augmented Generation system that allows users to chat with PDFs using local embeddings and open-source LLMs.

---

## Learning Objectives

What concepts does this project teach?

Example:

* Embeddings
* Vector Databases
* Retrieval
* Prompt Engineering
* Evaluation

---

## Difficulty Level

* [ ] Beginner
* [ ] Intermediate
* [ ] Advanced
* [ ] Expert

---

## GitHub Repository

Repository URL:

```text
https://github.com/username/project
```

---

## Demo

Provide one or more:

* Demo URL
* Video walkthrough
* Screenshots
* GIF

Links:

---

## Tech Stack

Frameworks:

* [ ] PyTorch
* [ ] TensorFlow
* [ ] JAX
* [ ] LangChain
* [ ] LlamaIndex
* [ ] LangGraph
* [ ] CrewAI
* [ ] AutoGen
* [ ] Hugging Face
* [ ] FastAPI
* [ ] Docker
* [ ] Kubernetes
* [ ] Other

---

## Features

List major features.

Example:

* Document ingestion
* Semantic retrieval
* Citation generation
* Multi-document support
* Streaming responses

---

## Installation Instructions

Can a contributor reproduce the project?

* [ ] Yes
* [ ] No

Installation guide:

---

## Requirements

Please provide:

* Python version
* Dependencies
* Hardware requirements
* GPU requirements (if any)

Example:

* Python 3.11
* CUDA 12.1
* 8GB RAM
* Optional GPU

---

## Documentation Quality

Does the project include:

* [ ] README
* [ ] Setup instructions
* [ ] Usage examples
* [ ] Architecture explanation
* [ ] Screenshots
* [ ] API documentation

---

## Educational Value

Why should this project be added to the roadmap?

Example:

This project demonstrates a complete production-grade RAG pipeline with evaluation and observability.

---

## License

Project license:

* [ ] MIT
* [ ] Apache 2.0
* [ ] BSD
* [ ] GPL
* [ ] Other

---

## Maintenance Status

* [ ] Actively maintained
* [ ] Occasionally maintained
* [ ] Archived

---

## Additional Notes

Provide any additional information maintainers should know.

---

## Submission Checklist

* [ ] Repository is public
* [ ] Project works as described
* [ ] Documentation is included
* [ ] License is specified
* [ ] Educational value is clear
* [ ] No copyrighted material is included
* [ ] No proprietary credentials are exposed

Thank you for contributing to the AI Engineer Roadmap
